creator: steve@havk.org
text:
On Mon, Dec 24, 2001 at 08:38:54PM -0600, Scot W. Hetzel wrote:

> With it in a separate bsd.*.mk file, it wouldn't need portmgr approval when
> another compat lib entry needs to be added for the next major release.

Chances are pretty good that someone from portmgr will be available
before a release to add a new entry since they also do the packages
for the release.  Also releases are (relatively) planned events so
we'll know way in advance when one needs to be added.

> But, I'll leave it up to the portmgr team as to whether it belongs in
> bsd.port.mk, or a separate bsd.*.mk.

IMHO (without my portmgr hat on) there's things that could probably
be better compartmentalized in bsd.port.mk but I don't know if these
would fall into that category.

-steve
